list.name: Changes
list.comment: Create and Clone Tables, All Cloned tests and Baked in Tokens complete.

"RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "TestNG.MainRunner.executor": "Run", "git-widget-placeholder": "master", "ignore.preview.features.used": "true", "ignore.virus.scanning.warn.message": "true", "kotlin-language-version-configured": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "0.2", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.pluginManager" } }

configuration.name: Scenario: Backfilling values in a data backed table

option.name: NAME_FILTER
option.value: ^Backfilling values in a data backed table$

option.name: PROGRAM_PARAMETERS
option.value: --plugin teamcity --name "^Backfilling values in a data backed table$"

option.name: SUGGESTED_NAME
option.value: Scenario: Backfilling values in a data backed table

configuration.name: Scenario: Upload a photo and add a caption on the image list screen

option.name: NAME_FILTER
option.value: ^Upload a photo and add a caption on the image list screen$

option.name: PROGRAM_PARAMETERS
option.value: --plugin teamcity --name "^Upload a photo and add a caption on the image list screen$"

option.name: SUGGESTED_NAME
option.value: Scenario: Upload a photo and add a caption on the image list screen

configuration.name: Scenario: Upload and select a photo then add a caption from the full screen image

option.name: NAME_FILTER
option.value: ^Upload and select a photo then add a caption from the full screen image$

option.name: PROGRAM_PARAMETERS
option.value: --plugin teamcity --name "^Upload and select a photo then add a caption from the full screen image$"

option.name: SUGGESTED_NAME
option.value: Scenario: Upload and select a photo then add a caption from the full screen image

item.itemvalue: Cucumber Java.Scenario: Backfilling values in a data backed table
Cucumber Java.Scenario: Upload a photo and add a caption on the image list screen
Cucumber Java.Scenario: Upload and select a photo then add a caption from the full screen image
Cucumber Java.Scenario: Backfilling values in a data backed table
Cucumber Java.Scenario: Upload a photo and add a caption on the image list screen
Cucumber Java.Scenario: Upload and select a photo then add a caption from the full screen image

task.summary: All run with upload - Details in progress
All run with upload - Details in progress
Updated to confirm confirm signout button
Updated all report titles to show from mobile
Added searching and can run all report item tests via main runner.
Clone content only completed up to confirming report view and actual items, but needs tweaking for formatting
ConfirmationFunctions complete for confirmationFunctionsConfirmCloned (Switch, Picklists and Date still need to be completed for all)
ConfirmationFunctions complete for confirmationFunctionsConfirmCloned (Switch, Picklists and Date still need to be completed for all)
Create and Clone Tables, All Cloned tests and Baked in Tokens complete.

MESSAGE.value: All run with upload - Details in progress
Updated to confirm confirm signout button
Updated all report titles to show from mobile
Added searching and can run all report item tests via main runner.
Clone content only completed up to confirming report view and actual items, but needs tweaking for formatting
ConfirmationFunctions complete for confirmationFunctionsConfirmCloned (Switch, Picklists and Date still need to be completed for all)
Create and Clone Tables, All Cloned tests and Baked in Tokens complete.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Create and Clone Tables, All Cloned tests and Baked in Tokens complete.
